name: paybridge-np/woocommerce
description: WooCommerce payment gateway plugin for PayBridgeNP

build: cd .. && cp -r woocommerce paybridge-np-woocommerce && zip -r paybridge-np-woocommerce.zip paybridge-np-woocommerce/ --exclude '*.git*' && rm -rf paybridge-np-woocommerce && echo 'Built: packages/paybridge-np-woocommerce.zip'
